Booth Selection

{% for bt in booth_types %} {% set avail = booth_availability.get(bt.id, 0) %} {% set sold_out = avail <= 0 %} {% endfor %}
Extra Electrical Equipment Each booth includes basic lighting. This is an outdoor event with limited electrical capacity, so vendors are strongly encouraged to use gas, charcoal, or other non-electric cooking methods. If you must use electrical cooking equipment, please use your best judgement and only select what is truly necessary — this will affect your booth placement due to the limited availability of electricity connections. {% set selected_equipment = draft.get('electrical_equipment', '') %} {% if selected_equipment is string %} {% set selected_list = selected_equipment.split(',') if selected_equipment else [] %} {% else %} {% set selected_list = selected_equipment %} {% endif %} {% for equip in ELECTRICAL_EQUIPMENT_OPTIONS %} {% endfor %}
